Pho Dai Nam - Pho Dai Nam - Authentic Vietnamese Cuisine & Handmade Pho in Norcross & Duluth, GA - Home
0
Pho Dai Nam, in Norcross and Duluth, Georgia, is committed to the freshest ingredients, offering top-notch, handmade pho noodles and a variety of authentic Vietnamese dishes. Our focus is on quality and authenticity, ensuring every meal is a memorable taste of Vietnam.

News & Events — Blog  — Pho Dai Nam - Authentic Vietnamese Cuisine & Handmade Pho in Norcross & Duluth, GAPho Dai Nam
0
News & Events
Alina Le
2/17/24
News & Events
Alina Le
2/17/24
Pho Dai Nam: Norcross & Duluth's Best Vietnamese Restaurant in Georgia
In the heart of Duluth and Norcross, Georgia, lies a culinary gem that transports diners to the vibrant streets of Vietnam – Pho Dai Nam. Renowned for its authentic flavors, Pho Dai Nam has earned its reputation as the best Vietnamese restaurant in the area.
Read More
News & Events
Tony Le
1/30/24
News & Events
Tony Le
1/30/24
Exploring the Authenticity of Fresh Handmade Pho Noodles at Pho Dai Nam
At Pho Dai Nam, located in the heart of Duluth and Norcross, Georgia, we take immense pride in our culinary practices, particularly in the art of making our pho noodles by hand. This traditional method is not just about preserving a culinary technique; it's about staying true to the authentic flavors of Vietnam.
Read More

--- Page: /about ---
Our Story — Pho Dai Nam - Authentic Vietnamese Cuisine & Handmade Pho in Norcross & Duluth, GAPho Dai Nam
0
Our Story
Authentic Flavors, Fresh Ingredients
Welcome to Pho Dai Nam
Welcome to Pho Dai Nam, where the essence of Vietnam's culinary heritage is brought to life in Norcross and Duluth, Georgia. Our dedication to authenticity and quality shines through our carefully selected fresh ingredients, ensuring each dish offers a memorable taste of Vietnam.
Handmade Pho Noodles!
Specializing in top-notch, handmade pho noodles and a variety of authentic Vietnamese dishes, we aim to delight your palate with flavors that are both rich and genuine. From the vibrant spring rolls to the hearty bowls of bun bo Hue, our menu celebrates the diversity of Vietnamese cuisine.
View fullsize
View fullsize
View fullsize
Your destination for Vietnamese cusine.
At Pho Dai Nam, we're more than just a restaurant; we're a family committed to providing a warm and welcoming dining experience. Join us for a culinary journey to Vietnam, where every meal is crafted with love and served with pride.

Experience authentic Vietnamese cuisine at Pho Dai Nam in Norcross & 
Duluth, GA - where fresh ingredients meet traditional Vietnamese dishes.
